query:
SELECT a.id, a.nomeAgente, a.chaveJ, a.cargo, u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.role 
FROM agentes a 
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.name = a.nomeAgente
WHERE a.cargo LIKE '%CEO%'
LIMIT 20;
command:
